title: Vaccinium pedris
taxonomy: Vaccinium pedris is a species of plant in the family Ericaceae. This family includes many species of flowering plants commonly known as heath or heather. The Ericaceae family is part of the larger order Ericales, which includes other plant families such as Staphylaceae and Clethraceae. Within the Ericaceae family, Vaccinium pedris is classified as a member of the tribe Vaccinieae, which contains many species of blueberries and related plants. The specific classification of Vaccinium pedris is still a subject of ongoing research and may be refined as more information becomes available.
